cases.description: Collaborative HTML inspection triggers the skill
cases.prompt: open this HTML file in collaboratory mode so I can click and you can see what I'm picking
expectations: Runs scripts/start-server.sh with --site-dir pointing to the file/folder
Returns a URL to the user and explains the DOM inspector is injected
Polls /api/selection or /api/events to observe the user's picks

cases.description: Agent driving a local page triggers the skill
cases.prompt: start html live inspect and fill this form for me while I watch
expectations: Uses /api/eval (if enabled) to run JavaScript that fills the form
Reports back what was filled and asks the user to verify in the browser

cases.prompt: watch what I click on this page and tell me the selectors
expectations: Starts the server pointed at the current directory or specified file
Reads /api/selection to return CSS selector, tag, classes, text for each user interaction
Does NOT require the user to paste selectors manually

cases.description: Remote URL testing does NOT trigger this skill
cases.prompt: test this production page at example.com/checkout
expectations: Does NOT activate html-live-inspect skill (local files only)

cases.description: Slide generation does NOT trigger this skill
cases.prompt: create a 10-slide pitch deck as HTML
expectations: Does NOT start a local inspector server
